4.description: The procedure code is inconsistent with the modifier used, or a required modifier is missing.
4.appeal_notes: Correct the modifier combination and resubmit. Attach documentation supporting the modifier.

16.description: Claim/service lacks information needed for adjudication.
16.appeal_notes: Identify missing field from RARC/remark codes. Supply missing info and resubmit or appeal with documentation.

18.appeal_notes: Verify whether original claim was paid. If original was denied, resubmit as corrected claim (frequency code 7).

22.description: This care may be covered by another payer per coordination of benefits.
22.appeal_notes: Submit to primary payer first. Include EOB from primary when billing secondary.

29.description: The time limit for filing has expired.
29.appeal_notes: Calculate actual filing window. Gather proof of timely filing or valid delay reason codes. Medicare = 365 days; Commercial = 90-180 days typical.

45.description: Charge exceeds fee schedule/maximum allowable or contracted/legislated fee arrangement.
45.appeal_notes: Contractual write-off. Cannot bill patient for CO group denials.

50.description: These are non-covered services because this is not deemed a medical necessity by the payer.
50.appeal_notes: Appeal with clinical documentation: physician notes, prior auth, peer-reviewed literature supporting necessity.

96.description: Non-covered charge(s). At least one remark code must be provided.
96.appeal_notes: Review patient benefit plan. May be billable to patient under PR group. Check for policy exclusions.

97.description: The benefit for this service is included in the payment/allowance for another service/procedure that has already been adjudicated.
97.appeal_notes: Unbundling issue. Review CCI edits. Cannot be separately billed when bundled into another code.

109.description: Claim/service not covered by this payer/contractor. You must send the claim/service to the correct payer/contractor.
109.appeal_notes: Identify correct payer. Resubmit to appropriate payer.

197.appeal_notes: Obtain retroactive authorization if payer allows. Appeal with documentation of medical necessity. Some payers waive if emergent.

252.description: An attachment/other documentation is required to adjudicate this claim/service.
252.appeal_notes: Attach required documentation (operative report, medical records, itemized bill) and resubmit.

N95.description: This provider type/provider specialty may not bill this service.

N130.description: Consult your provider manual for additional information about this service.

N386.description: This decision was based on a Local Coverage Determination (LCD).

MA01.description: If you do not agree with what we approved for these services, you may appeal our decision.

CO.name: Contractual Obligation
CO.description: Provider agreed to this adjustment per contract — cannot bill patient

PR.name: Patient Responsibility
PR.description: Patient owes this amount (deductible, coinsurance, copay)

OA.name: Other Adjustment
OA.description: No party is assigned financial responsibility

PI.name: Payer Initiated
PI.description: Payer-initiated reduction not tied to contract
